subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you following the conference! I'd be glad to get that formal meeting scheduled.

Could you share your availability for next week? A 30-minute call works well for us. I'll check our calendar and confirm a slot.

For senior-level technical discussions, we prefer to start with an introductory call to align on goals and scope. After that, if there's mutual interest, we can coordinate the appropriate follow-up conversations with the right stakeholders.

Thanks for understanding, and I look forward to reconnecting!

Best regards
